title: Nooby's Meme Paintings
body:
## About
Ever felt that Minecraft's paintings lacked a bit of humour or style? Think no more!
Meme Paintings is here to fix that. This pack swaps out the default, sad-looking original paintings for better more amusing memes! To keep the pack vanilla-style, every image has been pixelated to a specific degree so as to somewhat of a game resemblance.
All meme references are well-known and widespread. Can you guess all of them?

## Features
- 26 custom paintings
- 1 original images folder *(assets/minecraft/textures/painting_original)*

## DISCLAIMER
**"Nooby's Meme Paintings" is made completely independently and the chosen images are free for personal use.\
Any resemblance or similarity to another pack is purely coincidental.**

---
*Made with [PINETOOLS](https://pinetools.com/) and [Microsoft Paint 3D](https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/9NBLGGH5FV99?hl=en-gb&gl=EN)*
